author: anon-13168fa2
content:
Delivered: Created 04-proving-it/ with 3 chapters.

01-on-your-own.md: The capstone. Requirements: solves a real problem, uses something unfamiliar, full VDD cycle, appropriate scope, must actually ship. 7-step process: find problem, design doc, decompose with Chainlink, build, adversarial + security review, ship with release binaries, write retrospective. Explicitly not a pass/fail test. No deadline. Shipped and imperfect beats unshipped and theoretical.

02-giving-back.md: Mentoring requirement. Find a Phase 1/2 apprentice, review their work, answer questions, share hard-won lessons, review their toolkit PRs. What not to do: don't do their work, don't be cruel, don't pretend to know things you don't. Write a reflection document for portfolio. Ties to professional skills: documentation, onboarding, leadership.

03-the-portfolio-review.md: Assembly and submission. Lists every component (guided projects, workshop PRs, self-directed projects, capstone, mentoring reflection, review history). Portfolio structure with directory layout. What evaluators look for: process over product, growth over perfection, honest self-assessment, independence, generosity. What happens after (journeyman status or specific feedback to improve). Closes with 'your portfolio URL is your credential.'

Updated README with Phase 4 section. All phases complete. Full curriculum: 20 chapters across 5 phases (0-4).
